title: An act to study modernizing charitable organization funding opportunities

abstracts.abstract: Senate, March 26, 2026 -- The committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure to whom was referred the petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 193) of Nick Collins for legislation to modernize charitable organization fundraising opportunities, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 2997).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means

committee on Senate Ways and Means
